description: A logo featuring a green circular icon to the left of two lines of text. The icon consists of a partial circle enclosing two distinct elements: on the left, several vertical bar-like shapes resembling buildings or a bar chart, and on the right, a stylized stalk of wheat or grain. To the right of the icon, the word "Land" appears on the top line, and "Monitoring Service" appears on the bottom line, all in a shade of green text.
